01_initial_request.input_data: 85 个 NTF2 样蛋白的实验结构数据、合成荧光素底物 diphenylterazine (DTZ)、深度学习模型
01_initial_request.user_intent: 克服天然荧光素酶数量有限、稳定性差、对合成底物识别能力弱及特异性低等局限性，从头设计用于生物医学成像的小型、高稳定性、高特异性且无需辅因子的新型荧光素酶
01_initial_request.quantifiable_goal: 分子量小 (13.9 kDa)、热稳定性高 (熔解温度 > 95°C)、催化效率高 (k_cat/K_m = 10^6 M^-1 s^-1)、高底物特异性

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】天然 NTF2 结构存在长环等不稳定特征，且数量有限。【问题/缺口】需要生成大量理想的 NTF2 样结构作为支架。【决策】为了获得多样化的骨架，选择使用 trRosetta 对 2,000 个天然 NTF2 序列执行蒙特卡洛搜索和结构预测，预期获得接近天然 NTF2 的蛋白质骨架。

parameters.search_method: Monte Carlo searches in sequence space
parameters.loss_function: neural network confidence in predicted structure + topology-specific loss function over core residue pair geometries
parameters.loop_region_constraint: allowed the number of residues to vary

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Generated protein backbones closer to native NTF2-like proteins with short near ideal loops.

references.relevance: Effective in identifying experimentally successful de-novo-designed proteins and hallucinating new globular proteins.
Provides de novo sequence and structure discovery capability for loop and variable regions.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已生成初步骨架，但需增强结构特异性。【问题/缺口】骨架可能缺乏足够的结构稳定性特征。【决策】为了编码结构特异性，选择使用 Rosetta 对骨架执行埋藏长程氢键网络（HBNet） Incorporation，预期获得具有高结构特异性的支架。
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Resulted in 1,615 family-wide hallucinated NTF2 scaffolds with better scaffold quality metrics.

references.relevance: Used for structure-guided sequence optimization and HBNet incorporation.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已有 1,615 个支架，需设计结合 DTZ 的活性位点。【问题/缺口】缺乏与底物相互作用的残基排布。【决策】为了生成催化位点，选择使用 RifGen 对阴离子 DTZ 构象集合执行旋转异构体相互作用场（RIF）枚举，预期获得数百万个氨基酸侧链放置方案。

parameters.placements: millions of placements of amino acid side chains
parameters.interactions: hydrogen-bonding and nonpolar interactions with DTZ
parameters.key_residue: arginine guanidinium group placed adjacent to the N1 atom

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Enumerated rotamer interaction fields (RIFs) around each DTZ conformer.

references.relevance: Used to enumerate rotamer interaction fields on three-dimensional grids.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已生成 RIFs 和 DTZ 构象。【问题/缺口】需将活性位点匹配到支架空腔中。【决策】为了最大化蛋白 - 底物相互作用，选择使用 RifDock 对每个 DTZ 构象及关联 RIF 执行对接到支架中央空腔，预期获得最佳侧链 -DTZ 相互作用的对接模型。

parameters.required_interaction: interactions of HBNet side chains with DTZ explicitly required

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Generated docks with favourable side chain–DTZ interactions; top 50,000 docks selected.

references.relevance: Used to dock each DTZ conformer and associated RIF in the central cavity of each scaffold.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已选出 50,000 个对接模型。【问题/缺口】需优化剩余序列以确保折叠性和高亲和力。【决策】为了优化序列，选择使用 RosettaDesign 对周围残基执行第一轮序列设计（固定 RIF 和 HBNet 残基），预期获得维持侧链 - 底物相互作用的序列。

parameters.bias: towards the naturally observed sequence variation

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Optimized surrounding residues to hold side chain–DTZ interactions in place.

references.relevance: Used for sequence optimization for high-affinity binding.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已完成第一轮序列设计。【问题/缺口】RIF 残基可能未完全优化。【决策】为了进一步改进包装，选择使用 RosettaDesign 对 RIF 残基（除 Arg 外）执行第二轮序列设计（允许变异），预期获得更优的疏水和芳香堆积相互作用。

parameters.relaxation: scaffold backbone, side chains and DTZ substrate allowed to relax in Cartesian space
parameters.reason: identify apolar and aromatic packing interactions missed in the RIF

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Further optimized sequence allowing RIF residues to vary.

references.relevance: Can identify apolar and aromatic packing interactions that were missed in the RIF.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已完成序列优化。【问题/缺口】需筛选出最佳设计进行实验。【决策】为了选择高质量设计，选择使用计算过滤标准对设计执行筛选（结合能、氢键等），预期获得可合成的寡核苷酸池。

parameters.criteria: ligand-binding energy, protein–ligand hydrogen bonds, shape complementarity, contact molecular surface

02_agent_trajectory.observation: 7,648 designs were selected and ordered as pooled oligos.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已选定 7,648 个设计序列。【问题/缺口】需构建基因进行表达。【决策】为了获得蛋白，选择使用 E. coli 表达载体对寡核苷酸执行组装和克隆，预期获得全长基因。

parameters.assembly_method: Oligonucleotides encoding the two halves of each design were assembled into full-length genes

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Full-length genes cloned into expression vector.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已构建表达库。【问题/缺口】需鉴定有活性的荧光素酶。【决策】为了筛选活性克隆，选择使用基于菌落的筛选方法对文库执行直接成像，预期获得活性荧光素酶克隆。
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Three active designs were identified; most active referred to as LuxSit.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已鉴定出 LuxSit。【问题/缺口】需验证其生物物理性质。【决策】为了表征蛋白，选择使用 SDS-PAGE, SEC, CD 光谱和发光 assay 对 LuxSit 执行纯化和分析，预期获得分子量、稳定性及发光数据。

parameters.methods: SDS–PAGE, size-exclusion chromatography, Circular dichroism (CD) spectroscopy, Luminescence assay

02_agent_trajectory.observation: LuxSit is 13.9 kDa, soluble, monomeric, stable at 95°C, emits luminescence with DTZ.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】DTZ 设计成功，需扩展至 h-CTZ 底物。【问题/缺口】h-CTZ 分子形状不同，需匹配支架。【决策】为了获得 h-CTZ 支架，选择使用 AlphaFold2 对额外 NTF2 超家族支架执行置信度评估（pLDDT），预期获得高置信度支架。
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Created an additional set of NTF2 superfamily scaffolds.

references.relevance: Used for predicting local-distance difference test (pLDDT) and structure validation.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已有 h-CTZ 支架。【问题/缺口】需设计 h-CTZ 特异性序列。【决策】为了设计序列，选择使用 ProteinMPNN 对支架执行序列设计（基于 DTZ 轮次的 His/Arg 几何），预期获得可折叠且稳定的序列。

parameters.interaction_geometries: histidine and arginine substrate interaction geometries from first round
parameters.advantages: better stability, solubility and accuracy than RosettaDesign

references.relevance: Used for sequence design resulting in better stability and accuracy.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已设计 46 个 h-CTZ 变体。【问题/缺口】需验证 h-CTZ 活性。【决策】为了筛选活性酶，选择使用 E. coli 表达和发光检测对设计执行实验验证，预期获得 h-CTZ 特异性荧光素酶。
【背景】LuxSit 活性可进一步优化。【问题/缺口】需了解催化贡献并提高活性。【决策】为了优化活性，选择使用位点饱和突变（SSM）对底物结合口袋残基执行突变库构建，预期获得活性提高的变体。

parameters.target: each residue in the substrate-binding pocket
parameters.mutation_type: mutated to every other amino acid one at a time

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已构建 SSM 库。【问题/缺口】需鉴定高活性突变。【决策】为了筛选突变体，选择使用发光检测对库执行活性测定，预期获得活性提高的突变位点。

parameters.measurement: effect of each mutation on luciferase activity

02_agent_trajectory.observation: A96M (16-fold) and M110V (19-fold) substitutions increased activity.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】已获得优化突变。【问题/缺口】需验证最终变体 LuxSit-i 的性能。【决策】为了确认性能，选择使用动力学分析和细胞成像对 LuxSit-i 执行表征，预期获得高催化效率和高特异性数据。
02_agent_trajectory.observation: k_cat/K_m = 10^6 M^-1 s^-1, 50-100 fold specificity, visible to naked eye.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: 【背景】LuxSit-i 具有高特异性。【问题/缺口】需验证多重检测能力。【决策】为了应用，选择使用平板读数器和显微镜对 HEK293T 细胞执行多重生物测定（NF-κB 和 cAMP 通路），预期获得同时评估两个信号通路的能力。
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Successfully multiplexed reporting of diverse cellular responses.

03_success_verification.validation_technique: Biophysical characterization (SDS-PAGE, SEC, CD), Kinetic assays (k_cat/K_m), Substrate specificity assays, Cell imaging

molecular_weight.interpretation: Smaller than any previously described luciferase (Target: Small size).

thermal_stability.interpretation: Protein not fully unfolded at 95°C and structure regained upon cooling (Target: High stability).

catalytic_efficiency.interpretation: In the range of native luciferases (Target: High efficiency).

substrate_specificity.interpretation: 50-fold selectivity for DTZ over bis-CTZ, >100-fold over others (Target: High specificity).

03_success_verification.final_verdict: Goal Achieved: The designed LuxSit-i meets all quantifiable goals for size, stability, efficiency, and specificity, enabling multiplexed bioassays.
